scripts.build:site: python3 scripts/sync_site_metrics.py && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && cp -R site/. public/
scripts.validate:site: python3 scripts/audit_static_site.py site index.html --strict-seo --no-placeholders && python3 scripts/audit_static_site.py site en/index.html --strict-seo --no-placeholders && python3 scripts/smoke_examples.py
